sections.heading: WHAT CUSTOM DESIGN CAN COVER:
content: - Apps, web platforms, admin dashboards, client portals, and marketing websites — all designed together as one unified system with a consistent design language across every surface.
✔ Enterprise Software and Internal Tool Design

- Products in regulated or technically complex industries — healthcare, fintech, legal, government, defence — where compliance, accessibility, and domain-specific UX conventions require specialist knowledge.
- Full product design engineered for fundraising — prototype-ready, visually exceptional, and storytelling-ready for investor presentations.
- Focused, time-boxed design engagements to solve a specific product problem fast — ideal for teams that need a specific design challenge resolved quickly.
- Design for platforms that will be re-branded and used by other businesses — built with modularity, brand flexibility, and consistent quality as core requirements.

sections.heading: HOW THE PROCESS WORKS:
content: - We start with a detailed conversation — understanding your product, your users, your goals, your existing design (if any), your timeline, and what a successful outcome looks like for you.
- We document exactly what will be designed — scope, deliverables, process, milestones, timeline, and full investment. Everything is agreed before work begins.
- Before any visual design, we research your users, map your information architecture, and plan every user flow. Structure before aesthetics.
- We design in defined phases with reviews and approvals at each milestone — giving you visibility and control throughout the process.
- Complete interactive prototype and full developer handoff package — everything your team needs to build or present the product.

- Interactive prototype across all required flows
- Developer handoff package with full specifications

aiautomation.title: AI REAL ESTATE AGENT
aiautomation.description: We build a specialized AI agent for real estate businesses that handles every inbound property inquiry, qualifies buyers and renters, matches them to relevant listings, books site visits, and follows up with cold leads — automatically across all your channels. Real estate is a high-volume, fast-moving business. Leads come in at all hours. Buyers want instant responses. Renters want immediate availability confirmation. Your AI Real Estate Agent is always available, always responsive, and always following up — ensuring no inquiry is lost and no opportunity falls through the cracks.

sections.heading: WHO THIS IS FOR:

sections.heading: WHAT YOUR AI REAL ESTATE AGENT DOES:
content: - Whether a lead comes from your website, property portal listing, WhatsApp, or Facebook — the agent responds immediately, every time, regardless of hour.
- It asks the right questions — budget, location preference, property type, timeline, financing status — to understand exactly what each lead is looking for and how serious they are.
- Based on the lead's requirements, it identifies matching properties from your listings and presents them clearly with key details — driving the conversation toward a site visit.
- When a lead is interested in a property, the agent books the site visit directly — confirming the appointment in your team's calendar without any manual coordination.
- Leads that don't convert immediately are enrolled in an automated follow-up sequence — persistent but not aggressive — keeping your agency top of mind until they are ready to move.
- Every conversation — qualification answers, property interests, visit scheduled, follow-up stage — is logged and updated in your CRM automatically so your team always has a complete picture.
- Operates simultaneously across your website chat, WhatsApp, and voice inquiries — one intelligent agent managing all points of contact.
